sentences.sentence: The pearl has always had a special status in the rich and powerful all through the history.
sentences.translation: 纵观历史，珍珠在富人和权贵中一直享有特殊地位。

structure.text: The pearl
has always had
a special status in the rich and powerful
all through the history

difficult_points: has always had 使用现在完成时，表示珍珠的特殊地位从过去延续至今。
the rich and powerful 是“the + 形容词”结构，泛指富人和权贵。

sentences.sentence: For instance, women from ancient Rome went to bed with pearls on them, so that they could remind themselves how wealthy they were after waking up.
sentences.translation: 例如，古罗马女性睡觉时也佩戴珍珠，以便醒来后提醒自己有多么富有。

structure.text: women from ancient Rome went to bed with pearls on them
so that they could remind themselves
how wealthy they were
after waking up

difficult_points: so that 引导目的状语从句，they 回指 women from ancient Rome。
how wealthy they were 作 remind themselves 的宾语，表达“自己有多么富有”。

sentences.sentence: Pearls used to have more commercial value than diamonds until jewellers learnt to cut gems.
sentences.translation: 在珠宝匠学会切割宝石之前，珍珠的商业价值曾高于钻石。

structure.text: Pearls used to have more commercial value than diamonds
until jewellers learnt to cut gems

difficult_points: used to 表示过去曾经存在、如今已改变的情况。
until 引导时间从句，说明珍珠价值优势持续到珠宝匠学会切割宝石为止。

sentences.sentence: In the eastern countries like Persia, ground pearl powders could be used as a medicine to cure anything including heart diseases and epilepsy.
sentences.translation: 在波斯等东方国家，磨碎的珍珠粉曾被当作药物，用来治疗包括心脏病和癫痫在内的各种疾病。

structure.text: In the eastern countries like Persia
ground pearl powders could be used as a medicine
to cure anything including heart diseases and epilepsy

difficult_points: ground 是过去分词作前置定语，表示珍珠被磨成粉末。
could be used 是情态动词的被动结构；to cure 表示用途。

sentences.sentence: Pearls can generally be divided into three categories: natural, cultured and imitation.
sentences.translation: 珍珠通常可分为三类：天然珍珠、养殖珍珠和仿制珍珠。

structure.text: Pearls
can generally be divided into three categories
natural, cultured and imitation

difficult_points: can be divided into 是情态动词的被动结构，表示分类。
冒号后的三个形容词省略了重复的 pearls。

sentences.sentence: When an irritant (such as a grain of sand) gets. inside a certain type of oyster, mussel, or clam, the mollusc will secrete a fluid as a means of defence to coat the irritant.
sentences.translation: 当沙粒之类的刺激物进入某种牡蛎、贻贝或蛤蜊体内时，软体动物会分泌液体作为防御手段，将刺激物包裹起来。

structure.text: When an irritant (such as a grain of sand) gets. inside a certain type of oyster, mussel, or clam
the mollusc will secrete a fluid
as a means of defence
to coat the irritant

difficult_points: When 引导时间从句，主句说明软体动物随后作出的防御反应。
to coat 表示分泌液体的目的；gets 后的句点是源文异常。

sentences.sentence: Gradually, layers are accumulated around the irritant until a lustrous natural pearl is formed.
sentences.translation: 这些物质逐渐在刺激物周围层层积聚，直到形成一颗富有光泽的天然珍珠。

structure.text: layers are accumulated around the irritant
until a lustrous natural pearl is formed

difficult_points: are accumulated 与 is formed 都采用被动语态，突出形成过程而非实施者。
until 引导时间从句，表示层层积聚持续到珍珠形成。

sentences.sentence: A cultured pearl undergoes the same process.
sentences.translation: 养殖珍珠也经历同样的形成过程。

structure.text: A cultured pearl
undergoes
the same process

difficult_points: cultured 是过去分词作定语，表示人工养殖的。
undergo 强调亲历或经受某一过程。

sentences.sentence: There is only one difference between cultured pearls and natural ones: in cultured pearls, the irritant is a head called 'mother of pearl' and is placed in the oyster through surgical implantation.
sentences.translation: 养殖珍珠与天然珍珠只有一个区别：在养殖珍珠中，刺激物是一颗称为“珍珠母”的珠核，并通过外科植入放进牡蛎体内。

structure.text: There is only one difference between cultured pearls and natural ones
the irritant is a head called 'mother of pearl'
and is placed in the oyster through surgical implantation

difficult_points: 冒号后的分句具体解释 one difference；natural ones 中 ones 代替 pearls。
called 'mother of pearl' 是过去分词短语修饰 head，is placed 与 is 构成并列谓语；head 是源文用词。

sentences.sentence: This results in much larger cores in cultivated pearls than those in natural pearls.
sentences.translation: 因此，养殖珍珠的核心比天然珍珠的核心大得多。

structure.text: This
results in
much larger cores in cultivated pearls than those in natural pearls

difficult_points: This 回指人工植入较大珠核的做法。
those 代替前文的 cores，避免在比较结构中重复名词。

sentences.sentence: As long as there are enough layers of nacre (the secreted fluid covering the irritant) to create a gorgeous, gem-quality pearl; the size of the nucleus wouldn't make a difference to beauty or durability.
sentences.translation: 只要有足够多层的珍珠质（即覆盖刺激物的分泌液）形成美丽的宝石级珍珠，珠核大小就不会影响珍珠的美观或耐久性。

structure.text: As long as there are enough layers of nacre (the secreted fluid covering the irritant) to create a gorgeous, gem-quality pearl
the size of the nucleus wouldn't make a difference to beauty or durability

difficult_points: As long as 引导条件状语从句，表示满足珍珠质层数这一条件即可。
the secreted fluid covering the irritant 是 nacre 的同位解释；分号连接条件从句与主句是源文标点用法。

sentences.sentence: Pearls can come from both salt and freshwater sources.
sentences.translation: 珍珠既可产自咸水环境，也可产自淡水环境。

structure.text: Pearls
can come from
both salt and freshwater sources

difficult_points: both...and... 连接 salt 与 freshwater 两种并列来源。
come from 在此表示珍珠的产地或来源。

sentences.sentence: Typically, pearls from salt water usually have high quality, although several freshwater pearls are considered high in quality, too.
sentences.translation: 通常，咸水珍珠品质较高，不过也有一些淡水珍珠被认为具有很高品质。

structure.text: pearls from salt water usually have high quality
although several freshwater pearls are considered high in quality, too

difficult_points: although 引导让步状语从句，补充淡水珍珠也有高品质的例外。
are considered 是被动语态，后面的 high in quality 说明评价结果。

sentences.sentence: In addition, freshwater pearls often have irregular shapes, with a puffed rice appearance.
sentences.translation: 此外，淡水珍珠往往形状不规则，外观像膨化米粒。

structure.text: freshwater pearls often have irregular shapes
with a puffed rice appearance

difficult_points: with 短语补充说明 irregular shapes 呈现出的具体外观。
puffed rice 作复合定语，形容珍珠像膨化米粒。

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, it is the individual merits that determine the pearl's value more than the sources of pearls.
sentences.translation: 不过，决定珍珠价值的更多是其自身品质，而不是珍珠的来源。

structure.text: it is the individual merits
that determine the pearl's value more than the sources of pearls

difficult_points: it is...that... 是强调句，突出真正决定价值的是 individual merits。
more than 引出被弱化的比较因素 the sources of pearls。

sentences.sentence: Saltwater pearl oysters are usually cultivated in protected lagoons or volcanic atolls, while most freshwater cultured pearls sold today come from China.
sentences.translation: 咸水珍珠牡蛎通常养殖在受保护的潟湖或火山环礁中，而如今出售的大多数淡水养殖珍珠都来自中国。

structure.text: Saltwater pearl oysters are usually cultivated in protected lagoons or volcanic atolls
while most freshwater cultured pearls sold today come from China

difficult_points: while 在此表示两种珍珠来源的对照，而非时间。
sold today 是过去分词短语，修饰 most freshwater cultured pearls。

sentences.sentence: There are a number of options for producing cultured pearls: use fresh water or sea water shells, transplant the graft into the mantle or into the gonad, add a spherical bead or do it nonbeaded.
sentences.translation: 生产养殖珍珠有多种选择：使用淡水或海水贝类，把移植物植入外套膜或性腺，以及加入球形珠核或采用无核方式。

structure.text: There are a number of options for producing cultured pearls
use fresh water or sea water shells
transplant the graft into the mantle or into the gonad
add a spherical bead or do it nonbeaded

difficult_points: 冒号后用三个并列祈使形式列举不同养殖选择。
for producing 中 producing 是动名词；do it nonbeaded 表示采用不植入球形珠核的方法。

sentences.sentence: No matter which method is used to get pearls, the process usually takes several years.
sentences.translation: 无论采用哪种方法获得珍珠，整个过程通常都需要数年。

structure.text: No matter which method is used to get pearls
the process usually takes several years

difficult_points: No matter which 引导让步状语从句，表示方法不同不影响后面的结论。
is used 是被动语态，to get pearls 表示方法的目的。

sentences.sentence: Mussels must reach a mature age, which may take up almost three years, and then be transplanted an irritant.
sentences.translation: 贻贝必须先长到成熟期，这可能要花近三年，然后再被植入刺激物。

structure.text: Mussels must reach a mature age
which may take up almost three years
and then be transplanted an irritant

difficult_points: which 指代达到成熟期这一过程，补充说明所需时间。
be transplanted an irritant 是源文的双宾式被动表达，含义是“被植入刺激物”。

sentences.sentence: When the irritant is put in place, it takes approximately another three years for a pearl to reach its full size.
sentences.translation: 刺激物植入到位后，珍珠大约还需要三年才能长到完整尺寸。

structure.text: When the irritant is put in place
it takes approximately another three years
for a pearl to reach its full size

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正说明耗时事项的是 for a pearl to reach its full size。
is put in place 是被动结构，表示刺激物被安置妥当。

sentences.sentence: Sometimes, the irritant may be rejected.
sentences.translation: 有时，植入的刺激物可能会被排斥。

structure.text: the irritant
may be rejected

difficult_points: may 表示可能性，而非确定会发生。
be rejected 是被动语态，表示牡蛎身体对刺激物产生排斥。

sentences.sentence: As a result, the pearl may be seriously deformed, or the oyster may directly die from such numerous complications as diseases.
sentences.translation: 因此，珍珠可能严重畸形，牡蛎也可能直接死于疾病等多种并发症。

structure.text: the pearl may be seriously deformed
or the oyster may directly die from such numerous complications as diseases

difficult_points: or 连接两个可能出现的替代结果：珍珠畸形或牡蛎死亡。
such...as... 用 diseases 举例说明 numerous complications。

sentences.sentence: At the end of a 5- to 10-year circle, only half of the oysters may have made it through.
sentences.translation: 在一个5至10年的周期结束时，可能只有一半牡蛎能够存活下来。

structure.text: At the end of a 5- to 10-year circle
only half of the oysters
may have made it through

difficult_points: may have made 使用“情态动词 + 完成式”，推测到周期末已经存活下来的结果。
make it through 是习惯表达，表示成功熬过艰难过程；circle 是源文用词。

sentences.sentence: Among the pearls that are actually produced in the end, only about 5% of them will be high-quality enough for the jewellery makers.
sentences.translation: 最终实际产出的珍珠中，只有约5%品质足够高，能够供珠宝商使用。

structure.text: Among the pearls that are actually produced in the end
that are actually produced in the end
only about 5% of them will be high-quality enough for the jewellery makers

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 pearls，采用被动语态说明珍珠被生产出来。
them 回指 pearls；high-quality enough 表示品质达到珠宝商要求。

sentences.sentence: Imitation pearls are of another different story.
sentences.translation: 仿制珍珠则完全是另一回事。

structure.text: Imitation pearls
are
of another different story

difficult_points: of another different story 是源文表达，语义相当于“属于另一种情况”。
another 与 different 共同强调仿制珍珠的形成方式不同。

sentences.sentence: The Island of Mallorca in Spain is renowned for its imitation pearl industry.
sentences.translation: 西班牙的马略卡岛以仿制珍珠产业闻名。

structure.text: The Island of Mallorca in Spain
is renowned for
its imitation pearl industry

difficult_points: in Spain 后置修饰 The Island of Mallorca，说明地理位置。
be renowned for 是被动形式的固定搭配，表示“因……而闻名”。

sentences.sentence: In most cases, a bead is dipped into a solution made from fish scales.
sentences.translation: 大多数情况下，人们会把珠子浸入一种由鱼鳞制成的溶液中。

structure.text: In most cases
a bead is dipped into a solution
made from fish scales

difficult_points: is dipped into 是被动语态，表示珠子被浸入溶液。
made from fish scales 是过去分词短语修饰 solution。

sentences.sentence: But this coating is quite thin and often wears off.
sentences.translation: 但这种涂层很薄，而且常会磨损脱落。

structure.text: this coating
is quite thin
and often wears off

difficult_points: this coating 回指上一句由鱼鳞溶液形成的表层。
is 与 wears off 是两个并列谓语，分别说明厚度和耐久性。

sentences.sentence: One way to distinguish the imitation pearls is to have a bite on it.
sentences.translation: 辨别仿制珍珠的一种方法是用牙齿咬一咬。

structure.text: One way to distinguish the imitation pearls
is
to have a bite on it

difficult_points: to distinguish 修饰 way，说明这种方法的目的。
to have a bite 作表语；it 在数上与 pearls 不一致，是源文异常。

sentences.sentence: Fake pearls glide through your teeth, while the layers of nacre on the real pearls feel gritty.
sentences.translation: 假珍珠从牙齿间滑过时很顺滑，而真珍珠表面的珍珠质层会让人感觉粗糙有砂砾感。

structure.text: Fake pearls glide through your teeth
while the layers of nacre on the real pearls feel gritty

difficult_points: while 表示假珍珠与真珍珠触感之间的对照。
feel 是系动词，gritty 作表语说明真珍珠的触感。

sentences.sentence: Several factors are taken into account to evaluate a pearl: size, shape, Colour, the quality of surface and luster.
sentences.translation: 评估一颗珍珠时会考虑若干因素：大小、形状、颜色、表面质量和光泽。

structure.text: Several factors are taken into account
to evaluate a pearl
size, shape, Colour, the quality of surface and luster

difficult_points: are taken into account 是被动语态，表示这些因素会被纳入考虑。
冒号后的并列名词具体列出 factors；Colour 的大写保留源文。

sentences.sentence: Generally, the three types of pearls come in such order (with the value decreasing): natural pearls, cultured pearls and imitation pearls (which basically are worthless).
sentences.translation: 总体而言，三类珍珠按价值由高到低依次为：天然珍珠、养殖珍珠和仿制珍珠（后者基本没有价值）。

structure.text: the three types of pearls come in such order
with the value decreasing
natural pearls, cultured pearls and imitation pearls
which basically are worthless

difficult_points: with the value decreasing 是 with 复合结构，说明排列方向是价值递减。
which 指代 imitation pearls，补充说明其基本没有价值。

sentences.sentence: For jewellers, one way to tell whether a pearl is natural or cultured is to send it to a gem lab and perform an X-ray on it.
sentences.translation: 对珠宝商而言，判断珍珠是天然还是养殖的一种方法，是把它送到宝石实验室进行X射线检测。

structure.text: one way to tell whether a pearl is natural or cultured
whether a pearl is natural or cultured
is
to send it to a gem lab and perform an X-ray on it

difficult_points: whether...or... 引导 tell 的宾语从句，表示在天然与养殖之间作判断。
to send 与 perform 是并列不定式，共同说明鉴别方法。

sentences.sentence: High-quality natural pearls are extremely rare.
sentences.translation: 高品质天然珍珠极为稀有。

structure.text: High-quality natural pearls
are
extremely rare

difficult_points: High-quality 是带连字符的复合形容词，修饰 natural pearls。
extremely 修饰 rare，加强稀有程度。

sentences.sentence: Japan's Akoya pearls are one of the glossiest pearls out there, while the' south sea water of Australia is a cradle to bigger pearls.
sentences.translation: 日本的阿古屋珍珠是市面上最有光泽的珍珠之一，而澳大利亚南部海域则孕育着更大的珍珠。

structure.text: Japan's Akoya pearls are one of the glossiest pearls out there
while the' south sea water of Australia is a cradle to bigger pearls

difficult_points: one of the glossiest 后接复数 pearls，表示“最有光泽的珍珠之一”。
while 引出产地与特点的对照；the 后的撇号是源文异常。

sentences.sentence: Historically, the pearls with the highest quality around the globe are found in the Persian Gulf, particularly around Bahrain.
sentences.translation: 历史上，全球品质最高的珍珠产自波斯湾，尤其是巴林周边海域。

structure.text: the pearls with the highest quality around the globe
are found in the Persian Gulf
particularly around Bahrain

difficult_points: with the highest quality 修饰 pearls，around the globe 限定最高品质的比较范围。
are found 使用被动形式，在语境中表示这些珍珠的产地。

sentences.sentence: These pearls have to be hand-harvested by divers with no advanced equipment.
sentences.translation: 这些珍珠必须由没有先进设备的潜水员手工采集。

structure.text: These pearls
have to be hand-harvested
by divers with no advanced equipment

difficult_points: have to be harvested 是“必须”与被动语态的组合。
hand-harvested 表示以手工作业方式采集，by divers 说明执行者。

sentences.sentence: Unfortunately, when the large reserve of oil was discovered in the early 1930s, Persian Gulf's natural pearl industry came to a sudden end because the contaminated water destroyed the once pristine pearls.
sentences.translation: 不幸的是，20世纪30年代初发现大量石油储备后，受污染的海水毁掉了曾经纯净的珍珠，使波斯湾的天然珍珠产业戛然而止。

structure.text: when the large reserve of oil was discovered in the early 1930s
Persian Gulf's natural pearl industry came to a sudden end
because the contaminated water destroyed the once pristine pearls

difficult_points: when 引导时间从句，was discovered 是被动语态。
because 引导原因状语从句，说明珍珠产业突然终结的直接原因。

sentences.sentence: In the present days, India probably has the largest stock of natural pearls.
sentences.translation: 如今，印度可能拥有世界上最大的天然珍珠库存。

structure.text: In the present days
India
probably has
the largest stock of natural pearls

difficult_points: probably 表明作者对印度库存规模持推测而非绝对断言。
the largest 使用最高级，语境中的比较范围是全球。

sentences.sentence: However, it is quite an irony that a large part of India's slock of natural pearls are originally from Bahrain.
sentences.translation: 然而颇具讽刺意味的是，印度天然珍珠库存中的很大一部分原本来自巴林。

structure.text: it is quite an irony
that a large part of India's slock of natural pearls are originally from Bahrain

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语，说明讽刺之处。
slock 是源文对 stock 的拼写异常；are 与 a large part 的数不一致也按原文保留。
